title: The End Reimagined
description: A comprehensive endgame expansion that introduces a brand new dimension and unique biomes to transform the desolate reaches of the void. Designed for both solo and multiplayer play.
body:
**The End Reimagined**

The End Reimagined is a comprehensive overhaul designed to transform the desolate reaches of the void into a vibrant, challenging, and rewarding experience. This mod breathes new life into the endgame, ensuring that your journey to the stars is only the beginning.

**✨ Features**

Currently, The End Reimagined provides a foundational expansion to your world:

    A New Frontier: Explore a brand new Dimension distinct from the vanilla End, offering unique generation and atmosphere.

    Unique Environments: Discover the first of many planned landscapes with 1 New Biome featuring custom blocks and aesthetics.

    Track Your Progress: Challenge yourself with 2 New Advancements that reward your exploration and mastery of the new 

**🚀 Upcoming Content**

We are actively working to expand the horizon. Here is what you can expect in the very near future:

    Expanded Ecosystems: 3 additional Biomes to diversify the landscape.

    Life in the Void: 2 New Entities (mobs) to make the dimension feel alive (and dangerous).

    The Completionist's Path: 5 New Advancements to guide your journey.

    Master the Forge: A complete New Ore Set for high-tier gear and tools.

    Botanical Variety: A New Wood Set (currently in the code, with generation fixes coming in the next update!)


**💻 Compatibility & Installation**

To ensure a seamless experience, please note the following requirements:

    Multiplayer: This mod is required on both the Server and the Client. You cannot join a server running this mod without having it installed locally.

    Single Player: Works out of the box for solo adventures.


[Host your servers on Bisecthosting!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=7287)
